Open: Confirmed finding, not yet remediated; queued for work.
In-Progress: Remediation started but interrupted or incomplete.
Completed: Fixed and resolved (by remediation, or proven fixed by an identified merged commit).
Closed: No longer applies; cited code, module, or feature was removed or superseded.
Accepted Risk: Acknowledged but intentionally not fixed; rationale recorded.
Needs Verification: Low-confidence or inconclusive; must be confirmed before any fix.
